name: EEP-DB (Database Engine)
description: Building a storage engine from scratch with page-based storage, buffer pool manager, and RAII-based PageGuards for safe memory handling. Focused on correctness, eviction policies, and API design for future concurrency.

name: Custom Memory Allocator
description: Implemented a malloc-like allocator using sbrk/mmap with 16-byte alignment, block splitting, and coalescing. Designed for performance and low fragmentation.

name: Unipost (Posts Aggregator Backend)
description: Backend system that aggregates posts from multiple platforms using automated fetchers. Built with Django REST Framework.

name: CPU Scheduling Simulator
description: Simulates multiple CPU scheduling algorithms with performance metrics and test scenarios. Focused on correctness, visualization, and extensibility.

name: Quiz Generator Platform
description: Backend service that generates quizzes dynamically using AI models, with structured APIs and evaluation logic.
